items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for click/session attribution records.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of click/session attribution records, but the evidence provided does not confirm their existence or functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for these records, yet no concrete evidence is presented to demonstrate that they are being tracked or recorded. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary data to validate the requirement is missing.
